prompt: 佛教的慈悲跟聖經的愛有什麼不同？

assertions.text: Analyzes Hebrew hesed (covenantal loyalty) and/or ahavah, not just generic 'love'
Explains Buddhist karuna/metta as a distinct conceptual framework, not a Bible equivalent
Highlights the covenantal/relational nature of biblical love vs. the universal/non-attached nature of Buddhist compassion
Does NOT dismiss Buddhism or claim biblical love is 'superior' — presents structural differences
